title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: fprintd bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for fprintd is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.1 Release Notes linked from the References section.
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian

fixes.description: Update fprintd to the upstream version

full_text:
An update for fprintd is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.1 Release Notes linked from the References section.
